title: A shared symbol carries opposed meanings
temporary_input: The old depot keeps coming up. Some people treat it like proof that the community still has a center, while others talk about it like a reminder of what has already been lost.

tensions: A shared symbol carries both attachment and grief.
contradictions: The same remembered place can be used to claim continuity and to mark unresolved loss.
symbolic_patterns: A common landmark functions as an anchor for memory and as evidence that memory no longer settles belonging.
open_questions: Whether common symbols still gather people together or mainly preserve disagreement remains unsettled.
simulated_payload.model_markdown:
